name: small business owners using Gusto for HR management tool
description: For small business owners using Gusto processing 1–5 new hires/month, inefficient onboarding causes delays in employee productivity. We automate the onboarding workflow instead of manual onboarding processes.
target_audience: small business owners using Gusto for HR management
problem_solved: Inefficient onboarding processes for new hires
